name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (offense count fixed at 3992)

description: Baseline for exact user command (default formatter) with offense-count guardrail.
Raised default rayon cap from 8 to 12 threads when auto-configuring linter pool.

asi.hypothesis: Current 8-thread cap underutilizes 14-core machine on large, cold-cache workloads; raising cap should reduce wall time without affecting offense counts.
asi.observed: Runtime improved from 651.07ms baseline to 620.60ms with offense count unchanged.
asi.tradeoff: May slightly regress warm/cache-hit metadata-bound workloads on very high-core systems; still keeps a conservative cap.

description: Relaxed auto thread cap further to 16 (effectively no cap on 14-core hosts).

asi.hypothesis: Allowing full host parallelism may continue reducing wall-clock time on large cold-cache runs.
asi.observed: Further improvement from 620.60ms to 617.25ms with offense count fixed at 3992.
asi.next_action_hint: Probe larger/smaller caps or adaptive heuristics to balance cold vs warm-cache workloads.

description: Validation run after adding mandatory pre-benchmark build; observed much slower runtime than prior baseline.

asi.hypothesis: Previous kept gains may have been measured against stale binary; forcing build should ensure code-under-test is current.
asi.rollback_reason: Metric regressed versus prior baseline, and methodology shift invalidates direct comparison.
asi.next_action_hint: Re-initialize experiment with the updated harness and record a new baseline before judging code changes.

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (freshly built binary, offenses fixed 3992)

description: Fresh-baseline run with benchmark harness that rebuilds release binary before timing.

asi.hypothesis: Rebuild-before-run prevents stale-binary artifacts and gives trustworthy performance comparisons.
asi.observed: Baseline established at 702.43ms with offense_count fixed at 3992.
asi.next_action_hint: Test thread-pool heuristics and cop-filter hot-path optimizations against this new baseline.

name: nitrocop default-output runtime optimization on wt-gph-rspec-rip-out (conditional rebuild, offenses fixed 3992)
